title: Implement run_in_batches with bounded batch concurrency
description: Implement abatch.batch.run_in_batches(make_coros, batch_size): an async function that runs the given coroutine factories in SEQUENTIAL batches of size `batch_size`. Within a single batch the coroutines run concurrently, but one batch fully completes before the next starts. Results are returned in INPUT order. The snapshot is a stub that raises NotImplementedError. Fix abatch/batch.py. Do not modify any test files.
